title: La viaccia
writer: Vasco Pratolini, Pasquale Festa Campanile, Massimo Franciosa
actors: Jean-Paul Belmondo, Claudia Cardinale, Pietro Germi
plot: The original Italian is La Viaccia (the name of the family farm which motivates the plot). The death of a wealthy patriarch in 1885 sets off an interfamily power struggle. Son Ferdinando buys out his other relatives in order to ga...
